name: STS Risk Calculator
prerequisites: iOS Simulator or Android Emulator running
Valid test credentials (see Test Users sheet in Excel)
Network access to STS web portal for account creation flow
appMap:
graph TD
    START["🔴 STS Splash"] -->|Log in to your account| TOS["Terms of Service"]
    TOS -->|Scroll + I Agree| AUTH["Webview OAuth"]
    AUTH -->|Auto-login| HOME["🧮 Calculators Home"]

    HOME -->|ACSD Operative| ACSD["ACSD Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Mitral Regurgitation| MITRAL["Mitral Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Isolated Tricuspid| TRICUSPID["Tricuspid Calculator"]
    HOME -->|SAVR After TAVR| SAVR["SAVR Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Multi-Valve| MULTI["Multi-Valve Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Esophagectomy| ESOPH["Esophagectomy Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Lung Cancer| LUNG["Lung Cancer Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Ascending Aorta| AORTA["Aorta Calculator"]
    HOME -->|Settings ⚙| SETTINGS["Settings"]
    HOME -->|Search 🔍| SEARCH["Search"]
    HOME -->|Recent Cases| RECENT["Recent Case Detail"]

    ACSD -->|Planned Surgery Tab| SURGERY["Surgery Type + Incidence"]
    ACSD -->|Demographics Tab| DEMO["Sex, Age, Height, Weight, Race"]
    ACSD -->|Laboratory Tab| LAB["Lab Values"]
    ACSD -->|Calculate| RESULTS["Risk Results"]

    SETTINGS -->|Face ID| FACE_ID["Toggle"]
    SETTINGS -->|Terms & Conditions| TC["Webview"]
    SETTINGS -->|Privacy Policy| PP["Webview"]
    SETTINGS -->|Log Out| START

    style HOME fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style SETTINGS fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style TOS fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
